seo.title: Who we serve — professional service firms 5–50 staff
seo.description: Managing partners and founders at 5–50 person firms ($500K–$5M) with AI hype fatigue. Pain-led fit — not vertical lock-in.

hero.headline: Built for operators, not IT committees
hero.subheadline: Founders and managing partners who know they need custom automation — and have been burned by templates, agencies, or uncapped AI bills.

icp.psychographic: Smart enough to need custom, not median SaaS — hasn't found a partner who maps logic and ships without scope creep

pains.title: Rigid SaaS & template fighting
pains.description: Vertical tools force you to change how you work.

pains.title: Opaque AI costs
pains.description: Bills scale faster than value; no cap in scope.

pains.title: Fragmented data silos
pains.description: Real work lives outside your automation box.

pains.title: Shelved hype projects
pains.description: Budget and trust gone; nothing in production.

pains.title: Billable hour leakage
pains.description: Partners buried in intake, docs, and reconciliation.

operatorQuotes: We keep doing this manually because nothing fits how we work.
I looked at [tool] but it would force us to change too much.
I want to use AI but I don't trust most people pitching me.
I need someone who understands our business, not just the code.
The last developer was great at code and useless at understanding what we actually do.
fears: Another developer who burns budget without shipping what the team uses
A tool that locks you into someone else's workflow
An AI science experiment that doesn't move revenue
Your team rejecting another system they didn't ask for
wants: One workflow off your plate, permanently
Something the team uses the next morning
More partner-level hours back in the week

scorecard.label: Professional service firm
scorecard.passSignal: Law, accounting, consulting, advisory, agency, etc.

scorecard.label: Named active pain
scorecard.passSignal: Matches one of five core pains

scorecard.label: AI hype fatigue
scorecard.passSignal: Burned by prior tool or agency

disqualifiers: SOC 2 / HIPAA pipeline requirements we cannot meet
Full SaaS replacement instead of one workflow
Decision by committee without managing partner
Fast and cheap everything with no trade-off acknowledgment
